title: BRITA Marella XL Water Filter Jug Blue (3.5L) incl. 1x MAXTRA PRO Pure Performance cartridge - large-volume jug with digital LTI and Flip-Lid - now in sustainable Smart Box packaging
features: All-Rounder with the innovative BRITA filtration technology: 150 litres of filtered water with just one cartridge, larger size designed for high volume use.
Features a spout cover, one-hand filling with the flip-lid, BRITA Memo measures time to remind on filter exchange. BPA-free and dishwasher-safe (except digital indicator)
MAXTRA PRO 4-stage filtration with natural activated carbon and ion-exchanger pearls: pure and fresh water, full aroma in your coffee and tea and reliable limescale protection.
Filters trace impurities, reduces taste-impairing substances such as chlorine, limescale and metals like lead and copper.
Improved filter performance: BRITA's new innovative micro-mesh reduces microparticles ≥ 30 μm. 4x better than our previous BRITA MAXTRA+ filter cartridge.
The optimal filter jug for the higher demand: Full capacity of 3.5L for 2.0L of fresh, filtered water.
Included: 1x BRITA Marella XL water filter jug in Blue, 1x MAXTRA PRO Pure Performance water filter cartridge which lasts 150L and is recyclable.
